ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "ship_mode" TEXT /* Mode of shipping used (e.g., Second Class, Standard Class) */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative associated with the order */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the order */,
  "total_discount" REAL /* Total discount applied to the order */,
  "total_profit" REAL /* Total profit made from the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_ship_mode FOREIGN KEY ("ship_mode") REFERENCES shipping_modes ("ship_mode_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_lines" (
  "order_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order line */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order that the order line belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product in the order line */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales for the order line */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order line */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order line */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit made from the order line */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the order line */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order line */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_lines_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_lines_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for inventory management */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_modes" (
  "ship_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping mode */,
  "ship_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping mode (e.g., Second Class, Standard Class) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping mode */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the shipping mode */,
  "estimated_delivery_days" INTEGER /* Estimated delivery days for the shipping mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "sales_rep_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the sales representative is responsible for */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the sales representative was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the sales representative was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status update */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order being updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the order status */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the order status was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the status was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory update */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being updated */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory */,
  "reorder_date" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last reordered */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the inventory was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, customer service agent, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user access level */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted access */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the access level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, update order) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
